basic_details.job_title: MANIT Bhopal Coach Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal)
basic_details.short_information: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 6 Part-Time Coach Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.P.Ed. / B.P.E.S. / B.P.E. with Inter-University/State/National participation, Graduation with Diploma in Sports Coaching, Graduation with National Level participation in respective sport
qualification.details: Coach (Volleyball), Coach (Basketball), Coach (Badminton), Coach (Football), Coach (Kabaddi), Coach (Athletics): B.P.Ed. / B.P.E.S. / B.P.E. & Participation at Inter-University, State, or National level OR Graduation in any discipline from a recognized University and diploma in Sports Coaching OR Graduation in any discipline from a recognized University, along with participation at the National Level in the respective sport/game. Desirable: Minimum 02 years coaching experience.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MANIT Bhopal to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download MANIT Bhopal Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.maulana_azad_national_institute_of_techn: B.P.Ed. / B.P.E.S. / B.P.E. with Inter-University/State/National participation, Graduation with Diploma in Sports Coaching, Graduation with National Level participation in respective sport

content_sections.heading: MANIT Bhopal Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the MANIT Bhopal Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download MANIT Bhopal Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Coach (Volleyball), Coach (Basketball), Coach (Badminton), Coach (Football), Coach (Kabaddi), Coach (Athletics): B.P.Ed. / B.P.E.S. / B.P.E. & Participation at Inter-University, State, or National level OR Graduation in any discipline from a recognized University and diploma in Sports Coaching OR Graduation in any discipline from a recognized University, along with participation at the National Level in the respective sport/game. Desirable: Minimum 02 years coaching experience.

content_sections.heading: MANIT Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 45 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Online Application (Google Form)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MANIT Bhopal to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MANIT Bhopal Part-Time Coach posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the Part-Time Coach positions at MANIT Bhopal is 10-08-2026. It is advisable to apply well in advance of the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Part-Time Coach at MANIT Bhopal?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies for the Part-Time Coach positions announced by Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Part-Time Coach role?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a B.P.Ed. / B.P.E.S. / B.P.E. with Inter-University/State/National participation, or Graduation with a Diploma in Sports Coaching, or Graduation with National Level participation in the respective sport.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Part-Time Coach positions?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 45 years for all Part-Time Coach posts at MANIT Bhopal.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Part-Time Coach position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Part-Time Coach posts will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 15000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for MANIT Bhopal Part-Time Coach recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these contractual positions will be based on a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview on the specified date.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for MANIT Bhopal Part-Time Coach posts?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for these Part-Time Coach positions.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for MANIT Bhopal Part-Time Coach jobs?
faq.answer: The application process for the MANIT Bhopal Part-Time Coach recruitment is strictly online. Candidates are required to submit their applications through the designated online form.

faq.question: Q9. When is the walk-in interview scheduled for the Part-Time Coach positions?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Part-Time Coach positions at MANIT Bhopal is scheduled to be held on 12-08-2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for MANIT Bhopal Part-Time Coach recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for MANIT Bhopal Part-Time Coach recruitment can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
